overall.description: High-quality GTA V gameplay footage showing a first-person walk through a sunlit Los Santos neighborhood. The player travels along cracked sidewalks past single-story homes and commercial buildings, crosses a street intersection, passes pedestrians and vehicles, and approaches a railroad crossing in an urban environment with palm trees and power lines.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with utility poles and metal fences

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the cracked concrete sidewalk past residential properties with white fences

entered.detail: white painted metal fence with vertical bars enclosing a residential property
gray garbage bags piled next to a utility box on the grass verge
gray electrical utility box on the grass between sidewalk and street
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and overhead wires lining the street
large yellow commercial billboard with red text visible in the distance
low-rise residential buildings with varied architecture and palm trees

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a sunlit residential sidewalk. White metal fences line the right side while utility boxes and trash bags sit on the left verge. Power poles and wires crisscross the blue sky above, and a yellow billboard is visible in the distance.

events.description: reaches intersection and steps off sidewalk onto crosswalk
pedestrian in brown jacket walks past on the right side

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, moving from one sidewalk to the other while observing surroundings

notable_agents.action: man in brown jacket and red shirt walking along the sidewalk perpendicular to camera path

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign on a metal pole at the street corner
white painted zebra crossing stripes on the asphalt road
large commercial billboard featuring a person smoking

segments.scene_description: The camera reaches a street intersection and steps onto the crosswalk. A stop sign stands at the left corner while a pedestrian in a brown jacket passes by on the right. The scene opens up from the enclosed sidewalk to the wider intersection with visible billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with parked vehicles and shade trees

events.description: passing a pedestrian in a bright pink hoodie talking on a cell phone

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past parked cars and approaching a pedestrian talking on a phone

notable_agents.action: person in bright pink hoodie talking on cell phone while walking toward camera

entered.detail: weathered blue wooden fence running along the residential property line
blue sedan parked at the curb with visible damage
multi-story brown office building with horizontal windows visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the opposite sidewalk, the camera passes a blue wooden fence on the right and parked cars on the left. A pedestrian in a bright pink hoodie approaches while talking on a cell phone. In the distance, a tall office building rises above the residential area.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk transitioning to commercial area with mixed buildings

events.description: classic dark-colored sedan drives past on the adjacent street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk as a vintage car passes by on the street to the left

notable_agents.action: classic dark sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: bright yellow fire hydrant on the grass verge between sidewalk and street
single-story white commercial building with flat roof and large windows
tall concrete block wall with metal fencing on top enclosing a property

segments.scene_description: The walk continues past a yellow fire hydrant and white commercial buildings. A classic car drives past on the street. The environment transitions from residential to more commercial with concrete walls and larger buildings becoming prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching railroad crossing intersection

events.description: approaching railroad crossing with warning signals and crossing gates visible
multiple cars waiting at traffic light near the railroad crossing

agents.ego_description: approaching the railroad crossing, observing traffic and the surrounding commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: person in green shirt standing near the railroad crossing signals

entered.detail: railroad crossing X-shaped warning sign and signal lights on a pole
white regulatory sign reading DO NOT BLOCK INTERSECTION mounted on a pole
brown brick building with painted signage advertising keys and locksmith services
overhead traffic signal gantry spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a busy intersection with a railroad crossing. The camera passes a brick commercial building with key-cutting services and approaches the crossing signals. Cars wait at the traffic light ahead while a pedestrian stands near the railroad X sign.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk through a sunlit neighborhood that transitions from a quiet residential street into a busier commercial district. It begins along a sidewalk lined with white metal fences and utility boxes under a blue sky crisscrossed by power lines. As the camera reaches a street intersection, the view opens up from the enclosed walkway to a wider crosswalk where a pedestrian in a brown jacket passes by. The scene then shifts toward a more urban feel, passing a blue wooden fence and a pedestrian in a pink hoodie before the residential homes give way to white commercial buildings and passing classic cars. Finally, the environment becomes fully commercial as the camera passes a brick key-cutting shop and approaches a busy railroad crossing with waiting traffic and signal signs.
